title: Jet's Better Fences
body:
![Title image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30379844192fb3150a19e2ade7abf68f59a1427f.png)
# **Jet's Better Fences**
This texture pack was made to make fences look cleaner (and more _fancy_) for building while keeping the vanilla style.

This pack is not perfect as the model code is a bit bad (i had to change most of the code), so expect some bugs while using: **old pack versions in new Minecraft updates and fences that have not been textured.**

**So have fun building!**

 ![An Old Bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb3fe838b21e060be782ff081a839f204049d5d5.png)


## Use For Pack Creators ##

**You can use anything from the pack _except_  the textures I have created for this pack (you can use the template textures provided in the pack), feel free to use the model code as well.**

**If you use this texture pack as a base (model code, etc) _please_ add a link to this pack in the description of your pack.**

If you want to use any textures (apart from the template textures) message me on discord **@jetzzer** and I'll give you confirmation.


_If you are confused with any part of making a texture pack like this please DM me on discord and I will try to help as best as I can._
